metadata.description: AI enablement skills and prompts for development workflows

plugins.name: creating-prompts
plugins.description: Skills for creating new agent skills for Claude Code and VS Code Copilot

plugins.name: code
plugins.description: Baseline planning, spec, and codebase understanding skills. Works with any codebase, any stack.

plugins.name: react
plugins.description: Core React component development patterns — modlet structure, component extraction, registry, reuse, and validation.

plugins.name: react-mock
plugins.description: Mock data and data model patterns for Zod-based React apps — sample data generation, data model management, and feature workflows.

plugins.name: figma-react
plugins.description: Full Figma-to-React lifecycle — design analysis, component implementation, visual sync, and Code Connect mapping. Requires Figma MCP.

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Playwright-based QA workflows — E2E testing, debugging, responsive verification, visual diffing, and pixel-perfect orchestration. Requires Playwright MCP.

plugins.name: trpc-prisma
plugins.description: Type-safety patterns for tRPC + Prisma monorepos — AppRouter type inference and package instruction templates.
